name: FreshBooks
description: FreshBooks is a cloud-based accounting and invoicing platform for freelancers and small businesses. The API lets you manage clients, create and send invoices, track expenses, log time entries, and handle payments programmatically.

capabilities.name: clients_list
capabilities.description: List all clients for an account with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: clients_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single client's details by ID.

capabilities.name: clients_create
capabilities.description: Create a new client with name, email, and organization.

capabilities.name: clients_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing client's details.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List all invoices with optional filtering by status, date, or client.

capabilities.name: invoices_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single invoice by ID with line items and payment status.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Create a new invoice for a client with line items and due date.

capabilities.name: invoices_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing invoice's details or line items.

capabilities.name: expenses_list
capabilities.description: List all expenses with optional filtering by date, category, or vendor.

capabilities.name: expenses_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single expense by ID.

capabilities.name: expenses_create
capabilities.description: Record a new business expense with category, amount, and vendor.

capabilities.name: expenses_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing expense's details.

capabilities.name: payments_list
capabilities.description: List all payments received across invoices.

capabilities.name: payments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single payment by ID.

capabilities.name: payments_create
capabilities.description: Record a new payment against an invoice.

capabilities.name: time_entries_list
capabilities.description: List all time entries with optional filtering by client, project, or date.

capabilities.name: time_entries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single time entry by ID.

capabilities.name: time_entries_create
capabilities.description: Log a time entry for a client or project.

capabilities.name: time_entries_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing time entry's duration or details.

capabilities.name: time_entries_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a time entry by ID.

capabilities.name: estimates_list
capabilities.description: List all estimates with pagination and filtering.

capabilities.name: estimates_create
capabilities.description: Create a new estimate for a client with line items.

capabilities.name: items_list
capabilities.description: List all billable items/services.

capabilities.name: items_create
capabilities.description: Create a new billable item/service.

capabilities.name: taxes_list
capabilities.description: List all tax rates configured for the account.

capabilities.name: taxes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tax rate.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all registered webhook callbacks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Register a new webhook callback for a specific event.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a registered webhook callback.
